message:
chore(deps): Add rusqlite 0.38 for history tracking persistence

Add rusqlite and its dependency tree to support SQLite-based history
tracking, which was introduced in commit f95755b.

New dependencies added:
- rusqlite 0.38.0: SQLite bindings for Rust
- libsqlite3-sys 0.36.0: Native SQLite library bindings
- hashlink 0.11.0: HashMap with insertion-order iteration
- fallible-iterator 0.3.0: Iterator trait for fallible operations
- fallible-streaming-iterator 0.1.9: Streaming iterator for fallible ops
- rsqlite-vfs 0.1.0: Virtual filesystem support
- sqlite-wasm-rs 0.5.2: WASM SQLite support
- vcpkg 0.2.15: C/C++ package manager integration

Also updates rich_rust to published version from crates.io (previously
was a local/git dependency).

These dependencies enable the history command's ability to persist and
query usage data over time, supporting features like:
- Daily/weekly/monthly aggregation
- Cost trend analysis
- Provider comparison across time periods

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
